title: [FFFF00]Warning[-]
message:
The story of Ordeal Call II takes place after clearing "Olga Marie Quest_1."

Are you sure you want to start Ordeal Call II knowing you haven't cleared "Olga Marie Quest_1" yet and will encounter spoilers?

"Ordeal Call III: Bellum Novae Humanitatis,
Archetype Inception"
Unlocked on 07/29/2026 01:00 PDT.
